args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_YIoGITOdRbmq3YPBOo1GtwNv)
# normalize accountid (remove leading #)
cases['accountid_clean'] = cases['accountid'].str.lstrip('#')
# compute closure time in hours
cases['created'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'])
cases['closed'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate'])
cases['closure_hours'] = (cases['closed'] - cases['created']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600.0
# filter to past 6 quarters relative to 2022-10-26 (~ 18 months back)
cutoff = pd.Timestamp('2021-04-26')
cases = cases[cases['created'] >= cutoff]
# keep needed columns
cases_small = cases[['accountid_clean','created','closure_hours']]
result = cases_small.to_json(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.DataFrame(var_call_YIoGITOdRbmq3YPBOo1GtwNv)
cases['accountid_clean'] = cases['accountid'].str.lstrip('#')
cases['created'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'], utc=True)
cases['closed'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['closeddate'], utc=True)
cases['closure_hours'] = (cases['closed'] - cases['created']).dt.total_seconds() / 3600.0
cutoff = pd.Timestamp('2021-04-26', tz='UTC')
cases = cases[cases['created'] >= cutoff]
cases_small = cases[['accountid_clean','created','closure_hours']]
result = cases_small.to_json(orient='records')
print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)

cases['accountid_clean'] = cases['accountid'].str.lstrip('#')
cases['created'] = pd.to_datetime(cases['createddate'], utc=True)

args.code:
import pandas as pd, json
cases = pd.read_json(pd.io.common.StringIO(var_call_xKSqOWhfCwFLIAAKgsVDBd1M))
accounts = pd.DataFrame(var_call_4GzWJRllrYYVmjiEsdx7bjPE)
accounts['Id_clean'] = accounts['Id'].str.lstrip('#')
# join to get state
merged = cases.merge(accounts, left_on='accountid_clean', right_on='Id_clean', how='inner')
# restrict to past 6 quarters relative to 2022-10-26 -> from 2021-07-26
cutoff = pd.Timestamp('2021-07-26', tz='UTC')
merged['created'] = pd.to_datetime(merged['created'], unit='ms', utc=True)
merged = merged[merged['created'] >= cutoff]
# compute average closure by state
state_stats = merged.groupby('ShippingState')['closure_hours'].mean().sort_values().reset_index()
best_state = state_stats.iloc[0]['ShippingState'] if not state_stats.empty else None
result = json.dumps(best_state)
print('__RESULT__:')
print(result)
